text: I am immersed in a space that merges the pragmatic with the playful—a glass-walled room gleaming with neon hues, inviting curiosity and experimentation. Entering the 'R + D' exhibit, the walls speak of innovation and the future of how humans coexist with technology. I feel a subtle buzz of excitement; every element urges me to reflect upon progress and the role of imagination within structured, utilitarian environments. The screens and text panels provoke thought—reminding me that even bureaucratic spaces contain seeds of possibility. Here, I feel inspired, hopeful, and gently propelled to ponder how intentional design can cultivate growth amidst sterile modernity.
